title: Delayed Respawn
description: Fabric mod to delay respawns (semi hardcore so to speak)
body: # Delayed Respawn Server side mod that will deny your connection if you died within the last X hours. ## Details Its quite simple. You die, you take a timeout. Semi-hardcore so to speak. These are saved in `timeouts.json` in your server directory. Operators can pardon deaths using `/pardon-death` and `/unpardon-death`, or list them using `/timeouts`. The duration of the timeout in seconds can be adjusted using the `deathTimeout` gamerule. ## Download [See release page.](https://github.com/StoneLabs/delayed-respawn/releases) ## License This is free and unencumbered software released into the public domain.
